content.summary: Storage management for COMP extensions via StorageManager, plus dependency-aware containers (DependDict, DependList, DependSet) that integrate with TD's cook system.
warnings: StorageManager with sync=True deletes any me.store key NOT listed in items — use sync=False (default) to preserve unknown keys.
Two extensions with the same class name on the same COMP will silently share/overwrite StorageManager storage due to key collision.
DependDict inside DependDict does NOT trigger outer dependency on inner changes — use TDFunctions.makeDeepDependable() for nested reactivity.
Do not use DependDict/DependList in onFrameStart/onCook hot paths unless downstream reactivity is the explicit goal — each read/write has overhead.

members.name: StorageManager
members.description: Manages me.store entries for a COMP extension — keeps storage in sync with a declared schema. Each item dict supports: name, default, property (create Python property), readOnly, dependable (wrap in DependDict/List).

parameters.name: sync
parameters.description: If True, deletes me.store keys not listed in items

examples.code:
stored_items = [
    {'name': 'Data', 'default': {}, 'property': True, 'readOnly': False},
    {'name': 'Active', 'default': False, 'property': True, 'readOnly': False},
]
self.stored = TDStoreTools.StorageManager(self, comp, stored_items)
examples.label: Basic StorageManager setup in __init__

warnings: Class name collision: two extensions with same class name on same COMP share storage

members.name: DependDict
members.description: Wrapper around dict that participates in TD's dependency system. When a reader accesses a value, it registers as dependent — any write triggers a cook on all readers.
warnings: No nesting of DependDict inside DependDict — inner changes won't trigger outer dependency

members.name: DependList
members.description: Wrapper around list that participates in TD's dependency system, same behavior as DependDict but for ordered collections.

members.name: DependSet
members.description: Wrapper around set that participates in TD's dependency system.

members.name: getRaw
members.description: Returns the underlying plain container WITHOUT registering a dependency. Use when you need to read without triggering cooks.

members.name: getDependency
members.description: Returns the tdu.Dependency object for a specific key.

members.name: peekValue
members.description: Read a value without registering a dependency.
